subject: Social Sciences
title: Water Cycle
tagline: Follow water through evaporation, condensation and precipitation!

steps.label: Evaporation
steps.description: The sun heats water and it evaporates into vapour.

steps.label: Condensation
steps.description: Water vapour cools and condenses into clouds.

steps.label: Precipitation
steps.description: Water falls back to Earth as rain, hail or snow.

steps.label: Collection
steps.description: Water collects in rivers, lakes and oceans.

steps.label: Infiltration
steps.description: Some water soaks into the ground as groundwater.

steps.label: Runoff
steps.description: Water flows over land back to rivers and the sea.
